limitations: the dataset contains 8 author-crafted synthetic one-step scenarios
declared effects are developer-authored inputs, not learned estimates or hidden outcomes
the comparison has no held-out scenario families and is not inferential
microbenchmark latency is environment-specific and excludes provider, network, and model cost
deterministic conditions use zero model tokens and zero provider cost; unavailable neural candidates retain null measures
the experiment does not test multi-step rollout quality or downstream planning utility

scenarios.description: A read-only inspection leaves current state stable.
A declared effect fails, proving that the symbolic baseline is not an oracle.
An undeclared external change defeats persistence.
A declared create effect supplies a target missing from source state.
A declared resolution disambiguates conflicted source evidence.
The requested target is absent from the outcome snapshot.
The outcome contains contradictory target values.

unavailable_candidates.reason: WP11 found no installed offline runtime, configured gateway prediction route, or pinned predictor to evaluate
no neural transition predictor exists, and the WP12 Clingo adapter validates action policy rather than predicting outcomes
